constitution.rule: volume_at_risk_mbd must be a number in [0, baseline_flow_mbd] — a corridor cannot lose more oil than it carries.
duration_days must be a positive number — a modelled disruption has non-zero length.
disruption_fraction must be a float in [0.0, 1.0].
india_exposure_mbd must not exceed volume_at_risk_mbd for the same scenario.
Every scenario must reference one of the 8 known corridors.
Each scenario must carry an event_type set to one of: war_conflict, sanctions, political_tension, weather_disruption, market_spike, piracy, infrastructure_failure, none.
volume_at_risk_mbd must equal baseline_flow_mbd x disruption_fraction (within rounding tolerance).
india_exposure_mbd must equal volume_at_risk_mbd x india_import_share (within rounding tolerance).
